title: Cilium에서 Gateway API 사용하기
description: Cilium에서 Gateway API 사용하기 documents overview material for Gateway API in the infrastructure domain. It is classified as an entity page for the networking-stack class, so readers can understand its topic, scope, and place in the wiki taxonomy. The page highlights Gateway API CRD, and Cilium Gateway API 설정, with examples, commands, diagrams, or references kept close to the relevant explanation. Important search terms include cilium, gateway-api, cilium에서 gateway api 사용하기, infrastructure, and networking, helping both humans and generated indexes connect this page with adjacent concepts. The route is infrastructure / networking / gateway-api / overview, and the frontmatter keeps the canonical subject, ontology role, and navigation context aligned with repository validation.
